content: Backend: Tambah field 'capacity' di ClassModel + endpoint /classes return student_count per kelas
Backend: Models WeeklyHolidayModel + AcademicHolidayModel + CRUD endpoints (info-only utk monitoring)
Backend: Endpoints backup/export (.json + base64 files), backup/import (restore), backup/info
Backend: TeacherTaskModel (tugas titipan dari guru pengajar) + endpoints /piket/tasks (CRUD) + /piket/schedules/today + /piket/fill-journal (audit who filled)
Backend: Update Journal model dengan filled_by_user_id + fill_mode (self/piket) + task_id; update validate-qr/journal endpoints
Frontend: AdminClassesPage kolom Peserta + input capacity
Frontend: AdminUsersPage section Mutasi di edit dialog
Frontend: PiketTasksPage + Form Titipan + AdminJurnalRekap badge filled_by
Frontend: Public monitoring banner libur akademik info-only
Testing agent: backend Batch A (capacity, holidays, backup, piket-tasks, audit, mutation)
